daily_fact: Staten Island pizzeria Campania Coal Fired Pizza introduced a new spring sweet-salty slice while keeping its popular vodka pie on the menu, giving customers more seasonal options.
topline_md: New York faces compounding transit and policy strain as Amtrak cuts NYC-Boston service, the Trump administration again withholds state transportation funds, and city leaders push competing agendas on housing, transit, and key 2026 congressional races.

items.title: Amtrak service limited between New York and Boston
items.why_it_matters: Rail disruptions can delay weekend travel and commuting on a major Northeast Corridor route.

items.title: New York sues over withheld federal transportation funds
items.why_it_matters: Blocked transit money could delay repairs and projects affecting commutes, streets, and regional infrastructure.

items.title: Council proposal targets 35,000 homes on small lots
items.why_it_matters: Housing rule changes could expand supply citywide and affect affordability, development, and neighborhood growth.

items.title: Mayor Mamdani outlines plan to reduce driving
items.why_it_matters: Transit and street policy changes could reshape commuting costs, traffic, and neighborhood air quality.

items.title: State chief judge highlights Family Court inequities
items.why_it_matters: Calls for reform could influence how city families experience custody, child welfare, and court access.

items.title: Officer charged in Bronx subway station assault case
items.why_it_matters: The case raises accountability questions for policing in the transit system many New Yorkers use daily.

items.title: Counties Face SNAP Rule Rollout Chaos, Advocates Warn
items.why_it_matters: SNAP disruptions could delay or reduce food assistance for New Yorkers who rely on benefits.

items.title: Hot Sauce Expo returns to Brooklyn this weekend
items.why_it_matters: The popular festival brings crowds, local business activity, and weekend event options to Brooklyn residents.

items.title: Pop-up exhibit shows NYC as it looked 400 years ago
items.why_it_matters: The exhibit offers residents a unique, educational community event centered on the city's early history.

items.title: MTA hosts autism-friendly hands-on event at Grand Central
items.why_it_matters: The event expands inclusive public programming and helps autistic children feel more comfortable using transit.
